name: eval-mini
description: Tiny reproducible single-hop semantic-recall set. Retain facts, then each query must recall a memory containing the expected substring.
facts: The production deploy key rotates every 90 days.
Alice prefers concise Python answers without long preambles.
The release freeze starts on December 20th.
The staging database listens on port 5433.
Incident postmortems are due within 48 hours.
The team stores embeddings in pgvector.
The API rate limit is 100 requests per minute per token.

queries.q: how often does the deploy key rotate
what answer style does Alice prefer
when does the release freeze begin
which port is the staging database on
how long until an incident postmortem is due
what is the API rate limit
